@ouma_neko Ok Kalou is spiritual and Kasongo knows it. It's the centre of Kikuyus and their birth right, that's what Kasongo is trying to strip them off. Ol Kalou people know that Kasongo is using some Kikuyus on his side to achieve that goal. The fight isn't even political as such

You are overworking sir. I have lived to see the presidency of Kibaki and Uhuru as a grown up and all I keep asking, why are people singing wantam when no president has ever done all this in his first term. Then I realize it’s the Kikuyus. Their worry is Kenyans may never allow the mediocrity of another Kikuyu president. You’ve show us the light. Kenyans now know, you can come from anywhere and be the president as long as you get the job done. Mambo ya sijui tyranny of number hio ni ujinga ya huko kenol hatutakubali tena!
